content:
# Session 308 (iter-308) — review

3 prover lanes, all Route A: FBC localization brick (`Cohomology/FlatBaseChange.lean`),
DUAL round-trips (`Picard/TensorObjSubstrate/DualInverse.lean`), D3′ cocycle close
(`Picard/TensorObjSubstrate.lean`). Final tree GREEN (sync_leanok iter-308 sha `713e15a4` added 9
markers, 0 removed ⇒ full `lake build` succeeded), all newly landed decls axiom-clean
(`{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`).

## Sorry counts (per task_result + sorry_analyzer-class checks)
- FlatBaseChange.lean: **2 → 2** (5 new decls landed; 2 deprioritized canonical-mate sorries untouched).
- DualInverse.lean: **5 → 5** (1 helper landed; 2 round-trips reduced bare-sorry → element residual).
- TensorObjSubstrate.lean: **3 → 3** (1 verified step past iter-307 frontier; residual cocycle sorry stays).
- Global ~102, no net regression.

## Targets

### FBC `cancelBaseChange_localization_compat` (L1044) — SOLVED, PRIORITY (a) / iteration bar
The 02KH cancellation-compat brick. **Formalized lemma is STRICTLY STRONGER than the blueprint** (lvb
fbc308 confirms): holds for an ARBITRARY algebra map `S→S'` (`[Algebra S S'] [IsScalarTower R S S']`)
with NO `IsLocalizedModule` hypothesis — the localization case is a specialization. Proof = double
`TensorProduct.induction_on`, leaf closed by `simp only [LinearMap.rTensor_tmul,
Algebra.TensorProduct.map_tmul, IsScalarTower.coe_toAlgHom', cancelBaseChange_tmul_tmul]`. Pushouts
realized as concrete `B = TensorProduct R A S` (A the LEFT factor, so `Algebra.TensorProduct.map id
(toAlgHom)` is `→ₐ[A]`, keeping `rTensor M` A-linear; instance `TensorProduct.isPushout'`).
- Plus `_symm` (consumer orientation, `baseChangeCancelModuleIso = cancelBaseChange.symm`; by injectivity)
  and private helpers `cancelBaseChange_tmul_tmul` (L1024), `cancelBaseChange_algebraMap_mul_tmul` (L1005).
- **PITFALLS**: (1) right-factor instances `Algebra S (A⊗_R S)` / `IsScalarTower R S (A⊗_R S)` are
  SCOPED — activated via `attribute [local instance] Algebra.TensorProduct.rightAlgebra
  Algebra.TensorProduct.right_isScalarTower TensorProduct.isPushout'` inside a `section` closed before
  file end (auditor iter308: NO global leakage). (2) bare `map_smul` resolves to a `PresheafOfModules`
  overload in `import Mathlib` files — MUST write `LinearEquiv.map_smul`.

### FBC `pushforwardPullbackBaseChange_restrict_naturality` (PRIORITY b) — BLOCKED (deliberately not attempted)
Scheme/sheaf-of-modules-level statement; needs general-scheme scaffolding (affineOpens indexing, chart
datum `Spec R⊆S` / `X_{Spec R}=Spec A`, presheaf restriction maps). Prover landed the pure-algebra
cancellation floor instead (invariant forbids a non-axiom-clean shell) and handed off a precise 3-square
decomposition: move (1) = `gammaPushforwardIsoAt_naturality` (LANDED iter-307); move (3) =
`cancelBaseChange_localization_compat_symm` (THIS iter); **move (2) = ring-map naturality of
`pullbackSpecTildeNatIso` via the `conjugateIsoEquiv` mate — the lone HARD residual** (no drop-in
section lemma since `pullback_spec_tilde_iso` is built by uniqueness-of-left-adjoints).

### DUAL `sliceDualTransport.left_inv`/`right_inv` (L726/L749) — PARTIAL (first-ever attempt; real reduction)
Never attempted in iters 306–307 ("budget"). This iter reduced bare `sorry` → concrete element
residual via a verified tactic block (`dsimp [sliceDualTransportInv]; apply ModuleCat.hom_ext; refine
LinearMap.ext fun z => ?_; simp only [...]`). The two inner ε-swaps cancel via the new **`εInv_apply`**
(L192, axiom-clean) + `Iso.hom_inv_id`/`inv_hom_id` of `appIso`; residual is `φ.naturality` across the
slice morphism `A⟶W''`. **One-shot finish blocked by**: (1) `ModuleCat.Hom.hom` vs
`ConcreteCategory.hom` coercion bridge (`rw`/`simp [restrictScalars_η]` "made no progress" — needs
`erw`/`change`/`ModuleCat.hom_ext` before `εInv_apply` fires); (2) unit-carrier ring-map direction
matching; (3) **LSP died mid-session** — the concurrent D3′ lane broke `TensorObjSubstrate.lean:2663`
(whnf timeout) on disk, dropping DualInverse to `failed_dependencies` (temporal artifact: the final tree
built green, per sync_leanok). `εInv_apply` is the shared linchpin for the round-trips AND the 3
naturality sorries.

### D3′ `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` (~L2683) — PARTIAL (one VERIFIED step past iter-307)
STEP(b) cocycle interior. Landed (build GREEN, EXIT=0): `set_option maxHeartbeats 3200000`, a `change`
reshape of the coerced `.trans` chain to nested applied form, and the **R1-peel** (`have hnatL` +
`erw [hnatL]`). **KEY TECHNIQUE**: bare `erw [Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_left]` whnf-times-out even
at 3.2M hb (forced to verify `Scheme.Modules.pullback h ≟ SheafOfModules.pullback` via blind
`kabstract`); the explicit-`have` spelled with `Scheme.Modules.pullback h` makes the defeq
type-directed (cheap), and `erw [hnatL]` bridges the lighter `Sheaf.val`/`.obj` index spellings.
Residual = the genuine `mateEquiv_vcomp` cocycle: the h-comparison `sheafCompPb h` must collapse against
the intermediate-scheme sheafification `sheafAdj_Y`, which (unlike `gr_pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`) is
NOT free in the transposed chain and must be slid in from the f-collapse's `B_f.unit` by mate naturality
— the iter-308 reversing signal the planner flagged.

## Review subagents dispatched (all returned, 0 critical / 0 must-fix)
- **lean-auditor** (iter308): 0 critical, 1 **major**, 2 minor. Major = TensorObjSubstrate `set_option
  maxHeartbeats 3200000` already nearly exhausted by the verified prefix; closing the residual sorry will
  likely exceed 3.2M and need another bump (or the `mateEquiv_vcomp`/`TwoSquare` recast). All three files'
  new code GENUINE (reductions advance the goal; `change`/`erw` not masking a false goal; local-instance
  block correctly bounded). Report: `task_results/lean-auditor-iter308.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker fbc308**: 0 must-fix; 1 major + 1 minor (both blueprint-side). Major =
  `\uses{lem:tildeRestriction_isLocalizedModule}` over-specified on BOTH the statement (L1303) and proof
  (L1323) blocks of `lem:cancelBaseChange_localization_compat` (the Lean is strictly stronger, never
  touches localization) AND the proof SKETCH (L1325–1335) is stale (describes a localization-universal-
  property route the Lean doesn't follow). Minor = `_symm` has no block. Report: `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-fbc308.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker tos308**: PASS, 0 red flags. `lem:sheafificationcomppullback_comp` matches
  the Lean signature term-for-term; no new top-level decl missing a block; marker hygiene clean. Report:
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tos308.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker dual308**: PASS, 1 minor. `εInv_apply` (L192) real + axiom-clean but no
  block (Lean→blueprint debt). 31 decls checked, all signatures match; the iter-306 false
  "restrictScalarsLaxε wall" survives only as explicit refutations in both Lean and chapter. Report:
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-dual308.md`.

## Key findings / patterns
- FBC `cancelBaseChange` compat holds for an arbitrary outer ring map — no `IsLocalizedModule` needed
  (KB pattern recorded). DUAL `εInv_apply` is the reusable ε-swap-cancellation linchpin for the whole
  lane. D3′ explicit-`have`+`erw` recipe defeats the whnf bomb on `homEquiv_naturality_left`.
- **Process note**: the DualInverse prover's "build BLOCKED by TensorObjSubstrate:2663" is a TEMPORAL
  artifact of the concurrent D3′ lane editing on disk mid-session; sync_leanok ran AFTER both lanes
  finished and built the full tree green (+9/−0 markers). No standing build-block.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex`, `lem:cancelBaseChange_localization_compat`: added `% NOTE:` flagging
  (a) the formalized lemma is strictly stronger (arbitrary `S→S'`, no `IsLocalizedModule`), (b) drop
  `lem:tildeRestriction_isLocalizedModule` from BOTH statement and proof `\uses`, (c) the proof sketch is
  stale — handoff to the planner/writer (informal-prose edits are not the review agent's domain).

No manual `\leanok` overrides (sync's +9/−0 verdict matches the prover task_results). No `\mathlibok`
added (the 4 FBC decls + `εInv_apply` are project lemmas, not Mathlib re-exports; `cancelBaseChange`
itself is already anchored at `lem:cancelBaseChange_mathlib`).

## Blueprint-doctor (iter-308)
Unchanged from iter-305/306/307: broken `\cref`/`\uses` in `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` (4) and
`Picard_QuotScheme.tex` (13) — pre-existing, off the active front, 0 `\uses`-graph damage on gate
chapters; they gate opening `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` for the planned Quot lane. No orphan chapters, no
new axioms.
